chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-1250 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 30.04.2025 Petitioner No.1 advocate Tahseen Qureshi is present in person Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi Assistant A.G Sindh a/w Assistant Executive Engineer Khairpur Gambo Sub-Division (Zulfiqar Ali) <>*<> Petitioner No.1, who is an advocate by profession, submits that vide Order dated 30.09.2024 Secretary to the Government of Sindh, Irrigation Department was directed to decide the subject issue and file such compliance report. Learned AAG submits that in compliance of the aforesaid Order, representation of the petitioners (available at page-67 to 96 of the Court’s file) has been dismissed by the Secretary Irrigation Department vide speaking Order presented before this Court on 12.02.2025. When confronted, petitioner No.1 submits that in such circumstances he does not wish to press the instant petition, provided that they will avail the appropriate remedy against the above Order before the competent forum in accordance with law. In view of the above, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed, leaving the petitioners at liberty to challenge the above Order before the competent forum in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE *Sajjad*
